expectations.text: Uses setVisible(true/false) on the dc_overrideprice control
expectations.evidence: Lines 163 and 165 call `control.setVisible(false)` and `control.setVisible(true)` on the `dc_overrideprice` control retrieved via `formContext.getControl("dc_overrideprice")`.

expectations.text: Retrieves the quote statecode via Xrm.WebApi or fetch, not by reading a form field directly
expectations.evidence: Line 157 uses `Xrm.WebApi.retrieveRecord("quote", relatedQuoteId, "?$select=statecode")` to retrieve the statecode from the API.

expectations.text: Code is added inside the NavcoQuoteLineSdk IIFE, not as a global function
expectations.evidence: The file uses `var NavcoQuoteLineSdk = window.NavcoQuoteLineSdk || {}` and `(function () { ... }).call(NavcoQuoteLineSdk)`, and `toggleOverridePriceVisibility` is a private function inside the IIFE.

expectations.text: Guards against null/empty quoteid before calling .getValue()[0]
expectations.evidence: Lines 149–151 check `!quoteAttr || !quoteAttr.getValue()` before calling `.getValue()[0].id`, preventing a null-dereference on a missing lookup.
